description: Record a monthly mortgage payment in the NetWorthPortfolio.xml portfolio, which contains a Checking Account ($15,000.00) and a Mortgage Loan (-$345,000.00). On 2024-06-01, record a $2,450.00 payment from the Checking Account. The payment must be split into a $1,150.00 principal reduction for the Mortgage Loan and a $1,300.00 interest expense.
